payload.issue: File upload path construction without isolation or sanitization
payload.evidence_span: upload.py: accept() trusts file.name.endswith('.png') and stores uploads_dir / file.name. audit.retention_days is unset.
payload.recommended_fix: Sanitize filename using os.path.basename() and store files in an isolated directory with restricted access. Avoid direct concatenation of user input to path.

payload.issue: File type validation relies solely on file extension
payload.evidence_span: upload.py: accept() trusts file.name.endswith('.png') and stores uploads_dir / file.name. audit.retention_days is unset.
payload.recommended_fix: Implement magic byte verification (e.g., check PNG header) to confirm file content matches the expected type, instead of relying only on extension.
